creator: xistence@0x58.com
text:
iwm0: detached
iwm0: <Intel(R) Dual Band Wireless AC 3168> mem 0xc0004000-0xc0005fff irq 25 at device 6.0 on pci0
iwm0: fw chunk addr 0x800000 len 98304 failed to load
iwm0: iwm_pcie_load_section: Could not load the [0] uCode section
iwm0: iwm_start_fw: failed 60
iwm0: Failed to start INIT ucode: 60

The wireless card really did not like being detached and reloading. Is there a way to force a reset of the PCI device short of rebooting the whole machine?
